hero.tagline: Building things that stand the test of time.
hero.profileTitle: Solutions Engineer • Platform Engineer • UI/UX Engineer
hero.summary: Building enterprise software from concept to production. I specialize in full-stack engineering, cloud-native platforms, developer experience, and intuitive user interfaces that scale with business needs.

about.label: About
about.heading: Engineer who cares about the craft.
about.p1: I'm {name}, a Full Stack Software Engineer based in {location} with over {years} years of experience. I specialize in building web applications and cloud-native systems that are fast, maintainable, and built to last.
about.p2: My work spans the full stack — from pixel-precise UIs in React and Next.js to distributed backend services in NestJS and Go, running on AWS and Kubernetes. I'm comfortable owning features from architecture through deployment.
about.p3: I believe great software comes from clarity of purpose, disciplined architecture, and a relentless focus on the people who use and maintain it.

skills.heading: What I work with.
skills.subtitle: Technologies I reach for on a regular basis, from frontend to cloud infrastructure.

meltwater.progression: Intern -> Junior Engineer -> Junior Solutions Engineer -> Solutions Engineer Level 1 -> Level 2 -> Level 3 -> Level 4
bullets: Led architecture and delivery of enterprise dashboard solutions and API platforms.
Owned projects through the complete software development lifecycle from solution design to production operations.
Mentored engineers and interns through technical workshops and day-to-day delivery support.
Conducted technical sessions on Git, GitHub, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, and cloud-native engineering.
Participated in technical interviews and hiring panels.
Migrated CI/CD from Drone to GitHub Actions with reusable workflows.
Introduced GitOps practices using ArgoCD, Helm, and Kustomize.
Led security improvements and large-scale framework migrations.
Represent the engineering team through knowledge sharing, internal initiatives, and participation in the company cultural committee.

achievements.label: Achievements
achievements.heading: Impact delivered.
achievements.subtitle: Selected outcomes across architecture, delivery, platform, and leadership.

items.deliveryScale: Delivered and scaled 12+ dashboard and API solutions across enterprise products.
items.dashboardPrograms: Built multiple dashboard-based solutions including IMDA, HONOR, Hotel Radisson Groups, Samvada and FWD programs.
items.widgetArchitecture: Designed and shipped widget-based solution architecture used across dashboard experiences.
items.segmentTracking: Created reusable app-tracking packages using Segment analytics for consistent event instrumentation.
items.rabbitmqOnboarding: Worked on RabbitMQ-based onboarding for API solution teams and integration workflows.
items.fullstackOwnership: Owned full-stack delivery across frontend, backend APIs, deployment, and production support.
items.onboardingApis: Developed onboarding APIs that simplified customer provisioning and reduced operational friction.
items.cicdMigration: Migrated projects from Drone CI to GitHub Actions with reusable CI workflows and better reliability.
items.gitopsAdoption: Contributed to GitOps adoption using ArgoCD, Helm, and Kustomize for centralized Kubernetes deployments.
items.securityMigrations: Drove security improvements, dependency upgrades, and framework migrations across active products.

manifesto.label: Manifesto
manifesto.heading: Resilience. Journey. Vision.
manifesto.resilienceBody: Software is messy. Requirements change, systems fail, deadlines slip. What separates great engineers is how they respond — with methodical thinking, grit, and a bias for action.
manifesto.journeyBody: I don't believe in destinations. Every project, every bug, every late-night debugging session is a step forward. The engineer I am today exists because I stayed curious and kept building.
manifesto.visionBody: Code is the easy part. Seeing three years ahead — knowing which abstractions will hold, which shortcuts will cost you — that's the hard part. I build with the long game in mind.

philosophy.label: Engineering Philosophy
philosophy.heading: How I think about software.
philosophy.subtitle: Principles that guide my decisions, from architecture to code review.

cleanArchitecture.title: Clean Architecture
cleanArchitecture.description: Separation of concerns at every layer. Business logic should never bleed into transport or persistence layers.

typeSafety.title: Type Safety
typeSafety.description: TypeScript end-to-end. Types are documentation that the compiler enforces.

performanceByDesign.title: Performance by Design
performanceByDesign.description: Optimize at the right level - algorithm before cache, cache before hardware. Profile first, optimize second.

developerExperience.title: Developer Experience
developerExperience.description: Good DX multiplies team output. CI pipelines, tooling, and documentation matter as much as features.

maintainabilityOverCleverness.title: Maintainability Over Cleverness
maintainabilityOverCleverness.description: Code is read far more than it is written. Clear, boring code outlasts clever code.

testWhatMatters.title: Test What Matters
testWhatMatters.description: Test behavior, not implementation. Integration tests over mocks for critical paths.

contact.label: Contact
contact.heading: Let's work together.
contact.body: I'm open to senior and staff engineering roles where I can build impactful products and collaborate with strong teams. Reach out via email or connect on LinkedIn.
